description: Evaluation test cases for nibzard-web content skills

evals.prompt: I want to write about my experience debugging an AI agent loop that kept crashing for 3 days straight. It started when I tried to make the agent retry failed API calls automatically, but something in the error handling caused infinite recursion. I learned a lot about failure states and graceful degradation.
evals.expected_output: A new article file in src/content/log/ with proper frontmatter (title, description, tags, topics, etc.) and narrative-driven content about the debugging experience

assertions.name: has_required_frontmatter
assertions.check: Frontmatter includes title, description, date, tags

evals.prompt: quick thought: the only way you're going to figure this out is by getting your hands dirty and seeing what works
evals.expected_output: A new thought file in src/content/thoughts/YYMMDD.md with minimal frontmatter (just date) and the thought content

evals.prompt: add an idea: a web dashboard that combines container-use, Coder AgentAPI, and Claude into a single interface for managing AI agents
evals.expected_output: A new idea file in src/content/idea/ with structured frontmatter (title, subtitle, category, date) and marketing-style content

assertions.name: marketing_flair
assertions.check: Content includes tagline or target market

evals.prompt: update my now page - I'm currently shipping a new skill evaluation framework and researching how different models handle failure states
evals.expected_output: A new now entry in src/content/now/YYMMDD.md with date frontmatter and ## sections for focus areas

assertions.name: has_sections
assertions.check: Content uses ## headings for different areas

evals.prompt: post this screenshot from /public/images/claude4-dashboard.png - Claude 4 loves complex dashboard visualizations
evals.expected_output: A new image entry in src/content/images/YYMMDD.md with date and imageUrl frontmatter
